name: Besan Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix chickpea flour with a little water until you have a thick batter.
2. Add salt and garlic powder to the batter.
3. Heat oil in a skillet over low heat.
4. Drop spoonfuls of batter into the hot oil, forming small balls.
5. Fry until golden brown, then drain on a paper towel-lined plate.
6. Peel potatoes into small pieces and set aside.
7. Finely chop onions and sauté them in remaining oil with coriander, cumin, turmeric, and mustard powders.
8. Add chopped potatoes to the pan and mix well.
9. Stir in green peas and cook until tender.
10. Add diced tomato and continue cooking until tomatoes are soft.
11. Mix in the drained besan (fried chickpea flour) and stir gently.
12. Season with salt.
13. Do not let more than 15 minutes pass between adding potatoes to the pan and adding the fried besan to avoid overcooking.
14. Serve warm as a side dish.
